body:
## Summary
- restore the original play button UI while moving enterPlay to play-time sync
- fix PvE play flow so selected cards sync to the backend and confirm in one click
- restore User.comparePassword and cover it with a regression test

## Verification
- npm run build (frontend)
- npm run test:unit -- tests/unit/pve.handlers.test.ts (PvE test chain passes; suite still ends with the pre-existing savepoint export failure)
- npm run lint (backend still has pre-existing repo lint failures)
title: fix: stabilize pve play flow and auth model
